texto: Why is Santa an anagram for Satan? I mean, besides the fact that both have the same amounts of the same letters. Just consider the many other similarities between the two figures: both of them are red, both of them like to laugh, both of them give presents to children and both of them are kings of an ungodly underworld of unspeakable horror and suffering. Coincidence? I THINK NOT.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sam Logan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “Why is Santa an anagram for Satan? I mean, besides the fact that both have the same amounts of th…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, coincidence, santa pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de humor e santa.
